languages.text: Губернатор Иждриг Батошски, узнав о пути, выбранном потомком фон Валанциус, устроил один из самых кровавых планетарных бунтов в истории Простора Коронус. Под осадой он покидает Клеть и уходит в леса, где остатки армии Заркова девять месяцев ведут партизанскую войну. На девятый Иждрига убивают собственные отчаявшиеся солдаты — и дарят голову бывшего губернатора темн{mf|ому|ой} влады{mf|ке|чице} фон Валанциус в обмен на {mf|его|ее} милость.

Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.
languages.original_text: Губернатор Иждриг Батошски, узнав о пути, выбранном потомком фон Валанциус, устроил один из самых кровавых планетарных бунтов в истории Простора Коронус. Под осадой он покидает Клеть и уходит в леса, где остатки армии Заркова девять месяцев ведут партизанскую войну. На девятый Иждрига убивают собственные отчаявшиеся солдаты — и дарят голову бывшего губернатора темн{mf|ому|ой} влады{mf|ке|чице} фон Валанциус в обмен на {mf|его|ее} милость.

languages.text: イズドリーグ・バトシュスキー知事は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の後継者が選んだ道を知ると、コロナス・エクスパンションの歴史上最も血なまぐさい惑星蜂起を扇動した。包囲された彼はツァー・ケージを離れ、森に逃れ、ザルコフ軍の残党は9ヶ月間ゲリラ戦を繰り広げた。9ヶ月目、イズドリーグは自軍の兵士に殺され、その首はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の暗黒の{mf|領主|女領主}に捧げられ、その恩恵を得るために贈られた。
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left Tsar-Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

traits.locale_text: イズドリーグ・バトシュスキー知事は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の後継者が選んだ道を知ると、コロナス・エクスパンションの歴史上最も血なまぐさい惑星蜂起を扇動した。包囲された彼はツァー・ケージを離れ、森に逃れ、ザルコフ軍の残党は9ヶ月間ゲリラ戦を繰り広げた。9ヶ月目、イズドリーグは自軍の兵士に殺され、その首はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の暗黒の{mf|領主|女領主}に捧げられ、その恩恵を得るために贈られた。

languages.text: 总督伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基在得知冯·瓦兰修斯继承人所选择的道路后，悍然发动了科罗努斯扩区历史上最血腥的一场行星级叛乱。围城之下，他弃守牢笼，遁入森林，率领扎尔科夫残军开展了长达九个月的游击战。及至第九个月，伊兹德里格被他麾下绝望的士兵们杀害。他们将前总督的头颅献给黑暗的冯·瓦兰修斯大人，以求恩典。
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

traits.locale_text: 总督伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基在得知冯·瓦兰修斯继承人所选择的道路后，悍然发动了科罗努斯扩区历史上最血腥的一场行星级叛乱。围城之下，他弃守牢笼，遁入森林，率领扎尔科夫残军开展了长达九个月的游击战。及至第九个月，伊兹德里格被他麾下绝望的士兵们杀害。他们将前总督的头颅献给黑暗的冯·瓦兰修斯大人，以求恩典。

languages.text: Après avoir pris connaissance de la voie choisie par l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de la maison von Valancius, le gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski déclencha l'une des révoltes planétaires les plus sanglantes de toute l'histoire des Étendues de Koronus. Il finit par se réfugier dans la forêt lors du siège de la Cage et continua à mener sa résistance en employant des tactiques de guérilla avec les rescapés de l'armée zarkovienne. Au bout de neuf mois, Izdrig fut tué par ses propres soldats, qui avaient succombé au désespoir et offrirent la tête de l'ex-gouverneur {mf|au sombre seigneur|à la sombre dame} von Valancius afin de s'attirer ses faveurs.
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir pris connaissance de la voie choisie par l'{mf|héritier|héritière} de la maison von Valancius, le gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski déclencha l'une des révoltes planétaires les plus sanglantes de toute l'histoire des Étendues de Koronus. Il finit par se réfugier dans la forêt lors du siège de la Cage et continua à mener sa résistance en employant des tactiques de guérilla avec les rescapés de l'armée zarkovienne. Au bout de neuf mois, Izdrig fut tué par ses propres soldats, qui avaient succombé au désespoir et offrirent la tête de l'ex-gouverneur {mf|au sombre seigneur|à la sombre dame} von Valancius afin de s'attirer ses faveurs.

languages.text: El gobernador Izdrig Batoshski, al descubrir el camino que tomó {mf|el|la} líder de la dinastía von Valancius, provocó una de las rebeliones planetarias más sangrientas de la historia de la Extensión de Koronus. Bajo asedio, abandonó la Jaula y se retiró al bosque, donde los supervivientes del ejército de Zarkov libraron una guerra de guerrillas durante nueve meses. En el noveno mes, Izdrig cayó ante sus propios soldados desesperados, que entregaron la cabeza del antiguo gobernador a{mf|l señor| la señora} oscur{mf|o|a} von Valancius para obtener su favor.
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

traits.locale_text: El gobernador Izdrig Batoshski, al descubrir el camino que tomó {mf|el|la} líder de la dinastía von Valancius, provocó una de las rebeliones planetarias más sangrientas de la historia de la Extensión de Koronus. Bajo asedio, abandonó la Jaula y se retiró al bosque, donde los supervivientes del ejército de Zarkov libraron una guerra de guerrillas durante nueve meses. En el noveno mes, Izdrig cayó ante sus propios soldados desesperados, que entregaron la cabeza del antiguo gobernador a{mf|l señor| la señora} oscur{mf|o|a} von Valancius para obtener su favor.

languages.text: Vali İzdrig Batoshski, von Valancius vârisinin seçtiği yolu öğrendiğinde Koronus Enginliği tarihindeki en kanlı gezegensel isyanlardan birini başlattı. Kuşatma altındayken Kafes'i terk edip Zarkov ordusunun kalıntılarının dokuz ay boyunca gerilla savaşı yürüttüğü ormanlara çekildi. Dokuzuncu ayda İzdrig, eski valinin kafasını lütfu karşılığında karanlık {mf|lord|leydi} von Valancius'a hediye eden kendi çaresiz askerlerince öldürüldü.
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

traits.locale_text: Vali İzdrig Batoshski, von Valancius vârisinin seçtiği yolu öğrendiğinde Koronus Enginliği tarihindeki en kanlı gezegensel isyanlardan birini başlattı. Kuşatma altındayken Kafes'i terk edip Zarkov ordusunun kalıntılarının dokuz ay boyunca gerilla savaşı yürüttüğü ormanlara çekildi. Dokuzuncu ayda İzdrig, eski valinin kafasını lütfu karşılığında karanlık {mf|lord|leydi} von Valancius'a hediye eden kendi çaresiz askerlerince öldürüldü.

languages.text: Als Gouverneur Izdrig Batoshski erfuhr, welchen Weg der Spross der Dynastie derer von Valancius eingeschlagen hatte, entfesselte er eine der blutigsten Revolten in der Geschichte der Koronus-Ausdehnung. Schließlich verließ er den belagerten Käfig und zog sich in die Wälder zurück, in denen die Reste von Zarkovs Armee neun Monate lang einen blutigen Guerillakrieg führten. Im neunten Monat wurde Izdrig von seinen verzweifelten Soldaten getötet, die {mf|dem dunklen Lord|der dunklen Lady} von Valancius den Schädel des einstigen Gouverneurs übergaben, um {mf|ihn|sie} milde zu stimmen.
languages.original_text: Governor Izdrig Batoshski, upon learning of the path chosen by the von Valancius scion, launched one of the bloodiest planetary revolts in the history of the Koronus Expanse. Under siege, he left the Cage and retreated into the forests, where the remnants of Zarkov's army waged guerrilla warfare for nine months. In the ninth month, Izdrig was killed by his own desperate soldiers, who gifted the former governor's head to the dark {mf|lord|lady} von Valancius in exchange for {mf|his|her} favour.

Schließlich verließ er den belagerten Käfig und zog sich in die Wälder zurück, in denen die Reste von Zarkovs Armee neun Monate lang einen blutigen Guerillakrieg führten. Im neunten Monat wurde Izdrig von seinen verzweifelten Soldaten getötet, die {mf|dem dunklen Lord|der dunklen Lady} von Valancius den Schädel des einstigen Gouverneurs übergaben, um {mf|ihn|sie} milde zu stimmen.
